title: Daewoo Essentials Egg Boiler For Boiled Eggs, 7 Portions, Soft Medium And Hard Egg Indicator, Ready Signal, Easy Clean And Compact Design
features: FEEDS THE WHOLE FAMILY – The Daewoo egg boiler can cook up to 7 eggs at once making it perfect for preparing breakfast, snacks for on the go or prepping for a picnic for the whole family in one go

PRECISE COOKING MADE EASY – Includes a water measuring cup with clear indicator lines for soft, medium, or hard-boiled eggs, with a built-in piercing pin at the bottom of the cup to prepare eggs before cooking, ensuring perfect results every time

CONVENIENT AND RELIABLE – With an illuminated on/off switch, you’ll know when the egg boiler is actively cooking. Plus, it signals the end of the cooking cycle with a beep, making it effortless to achieve your ideal egg doneness

COMPACT AND EASY TO CLEAN – With dishwasher-safe accessories for quick cleanup and a compact design for easy storage, this egg boiler is perfect for any kitchen. Enjoy hassle-free maintenance and keep your countertops clutter-free
description: The Daewoo Egg Boiler is the perfect kitchen companion for anyone who values convenience and efficiency. Whether you're a busy professional needing a quick, protein-packed breakfast before heading to the office, or a parent preparing a nutritious meal for your family, this egg boiler simplifies the process of cooking eggs to your preferred doneness—soft, medium, or hard boiled. With the capacity to cook up to 7 eggs at once, it’s ideal for weekend brunches with friends or prepping snacks for the week ahead. The included water measuring cup, with precise indicator lines, ensures perfect results every time, while the built-in piercing pin to prep your eggs before cooking. The on/off switch illuminates to let you know when the eggs are cooking, and a beep alerts you when they’re ready, so you can focus on other tasks without worrying about overcooking. Its compact design makes it easy to store in small kitchens or dorm rooms, and the dishwasher-safe accessories ensure effortless cleanup. Whether you’re making deviled eggs for a party, egg salad for lunch, or just a quick breakfast on the go, the Daewoo Egg Boiler is designed to fit seamlessly into your routine.
